title: Infosys to Launch Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions in Düsseldorf
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the launch of the Infosys Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions at its premises in Düsseldorf, Germany. The lab is part of Infosys’s collaboration with SAP and is intended to help enterprises explore AI and data, co-create tailored solutions, and accelerate adoption of Infosys and SAP offerings. The lab will leverage SAP Business AI, SAP Business Data Cloud, RISE with SAP, Infosys Cobalt, and Infosys Topaz. Infosys said solutions from the Düsseldorf lab will also be available across its global network of over 12 Living Labs.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced the launch of the Infosys Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions at Infosys' premises in Düsseldorf, Germany.

The lab is part of the collaboration between Infosys and SAP and is designed to help enterprises explore AI and data, co-create tailored solutions, and accelerate adoption of Infosys and SAP offerings.
The lab will leverage SAP Business AI, SAP Business Data Cloud, the RISE with SAP journey, Infosys Cobalt, and Infosys Topaz.

Infosys said the lab will help organizations envision solutions to improve financial performance, operational efficiency, risk mitigation, real-time data-driven decision-making, compliance, and security.
Solutions from the Enterprise Innovation Lab in Dusseldorf will also be available across Infosys' global network of over 12 Living Labs.
Infosys stated it has over 25 years of expertise in SAP software transformation, consulting, technology, and a comprehensive suite of tools and accelerators.

products_or_platforms.description: Infosys announced the launch of a lab in Düsseldorf, Germany, to help enterprises explore AI and data, co-create tailored solutions, and accelerate adoption of Infosys and SAP offerings.
products_or_platforms.target_market_or_use_case: Enterprise transformation using SAP Business AI, SAP Business Data Cloud, RISE with SAP, Infosys Cobalt, and Infosys Topaz

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, today announced the launch of the Infosys Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions at Infosys' premises in Düsseldorf, Germany.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main event, location, and launch announcement.

important_text_spans.text: As part of the collaboration between Infosys and SAP, this lab is designed to enable enterprises to explore the limitless possibilities of AI and data, cocreate tailored solutions that address their business challenges, and accelerate the adoption of cuttingedge Infosys and SAP offerings.
important_text_spans.reason: Explains the strategic purpose of the lab and SAP collaboration.

important_text_spans.text: Solutions from the Enterprise Innovation Lab in Dusseldorf will also be available across Infosys' global network of over 12 Living Labs.
important_text_spans.reason: Shows the announced lab’s reach beyond the Düsseldorf location.

processing_notes: No financial value, investment amount, revenue impact, or contract duration was disclosed. The SAP collaboration was treated as context for the product/platform launch rather than a separate partnership item because the document’s main event is the launch of the lab.
